message:
refactor: remove dependency map view; show imports per doc page

- Remove DependencyMapView component and deps nav item entirely
- Remove depsGraph state and _deps.json fetch from frontend
- Remove deps view type from View union
- Strip @/ and ~/ path alias prefixes in resolveManifestKey and
  resolveDepToFilePath so @/lib/types resolves to lib/types.ts
- Imports and Imported by sections remain on each individual doc page
fix: pause all pairs on subscription cancellation, keep 1 for free trial
